title: Woostese
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Woostese''' was the native language of the [[Woostoid]] species from [[Woostri/Legends|Woostri]]. It was a very precise language with a great amount of dialects, each with its local idioms.

Abbreviations and contractions were always rejected in Woostese. Woostoids considered that Woostese was a perfect language, needing no simplifications.

Most Woostoids were trilingual in Woostese, [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] and a third language, being literate in all of them.

{{Language-stub}}
